name: Restreamer
description: An easy to use open source video server
compose:
name: slashnode-restreamer
services:
  web:
    image: datarhei/restreamer:2.12.0
    container_name: restreamer
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PUID: '1000'
      PGID: '1000'
    volumes:
      - web_config:/core/config
      - web_data:/core/data
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8135:8080
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_config:
    name: slashnode-restreamer_web_config
  web_data:
    name: slashnode-restreamer_web_data
